description: Resultados de backtesting — Ranking, métricas y comparación de motores — Axio-Quant Factory V3

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'done') AS completados, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'running') AS ejecutando, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'queued') AS en_cola, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'error') AS errores FROM backtest_jobs

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY (r.metrics->>'sharpe')::float DESC) AS rank, r.blueprint_id, r.symbol, r.broker, r.metrics->>'engine' AS engine, ROUND((r.metrics->>'sharpe')::numeric, 4) AS sharpe, ROUND(((r.metrics->>'total_return')::float * 100)::numeric, 2) AS return_pct, ROUND(((r.metrics->>'max_drawdown')::float * 100)::numeric, 2) AS maxdd_pct, ROUND(((r.metrics->>'win_rate')::float * 100)::numeric, 1) AS win_rate_pct, (r.metrics->>'n_trades')::int AS trades FROM backtest_results r JOIN backtest_jobs j ON j.job_id = r.job_id WHERE j.status = 'done' ORDER BY (r.metrics->>'sharpe')::float DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT r.metrics->>'engine' AS engine, ROUND(AVG((r.metrics->>'sharpe')::float)::numeric, 4) AS avg_sharpe, COUNT(*) AS n_backtests FROM backtest_results r JOIN backtest_jobs j ON j.job_id = r.job_id WHERE j.status = 'done' GROUP BY r.metrics->>'engine' ORDER BY avg_sharpe DESC

SELECT r.metrics->>'engine' AS engine, ROUND((AVG((r.metrics->>'total_return')::float) * 100)::numeric, 2) AS avg_return_pct, ROUND((AVG((r.metrics->>'max_drawdown')::float) * 100)::numeric, 2) AS avg_maxdd_pct FROM backtest_results r JOIN backtest_jobs j ON j.job_id = r.job_id WHERE j.status = 'done' GROUP BY r.metrics->>'engine' ORDER BY avg_return_pct DESC

SELECT date_trunc('day', j.created_at) AS time, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE j.status = 'done') AS completados, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE j.status = 'error') AS errores FROM backtest_jobs j WHERE j.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT (r.metrics->>'sharpe')::float AS sharpe FROM backtest_results r JOIN backtest_jobs j ON j.job_id = r.job_id WHERE j.status = 'done'

SELECT (r.metrics->>'sharpe')::float AS sharpe, (r.metrics->>'win_rate')::float * 100 AS win_rate, r.metrics->>'engine' AS engine FROM backtest_results r JOIN backtest_jobs j ON j.job_id = r.job_id WHERE j.status = 'done'

title: Backtest Results — Axio-Quant
